Home / Service Areas / Cleveland

Flooring contractor in Cleveland, OH

Trusted local professionals serving Cleveland and surrounding communities

Serving Cleveland, OH

Highland Floor Refinishing is proud to serve the residents and businesses of Cleveland, Ohio. We offer a comprehensive range of flooring services, from hardwood refinishing and installation to laminate and vinyl options. Our team is dedicated to providing exceptional craftsmanship and customer service to ensure your complete satisfaction. As a local company, we understand the unique architectural styles and flooring needs of Cleveland homes and businesses. Whether you're looking to restore the historic charm of your hardwood floors or update your space with modern flooring solutions, Highland Floor Refinishing has the expertise and experience to deliver outstanding results.

Cleveland is a vibrant city known for its rich history, diverse neighborhoods, and thriving arts and culture scene. We are committed to providing top-quality flooring services that enhance the beauty and value of Cleveland properties.

Flooring contractor Services in Cleveland

Hardwood Refinishing

Restore the natural beauty of your hardwood floors.

Hardwood Installation

Install new hardwood floors for lasting beauty and value.

Vinyl Flooring

Waterproof and stylish vinyl flooring solutions.

Learn more →

Tile Installation

Expert tile installation for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.

Learn more →

Floor Repair Services

Reliable floor repair for all types of flooring.

Learn more →
